title: Ghana Bauxite Energy, Utilities & Waste ransomware incident

extortion.description: ghanabauxite.com zoominfo.com/c/ghana-bauxite-company-ltd/462019799 Ghana Bauxite Company Limited specializes in the extraction and production of premium trihydrate bauxite in Ghana, operating the country's only active bauxite mine since the 1940s. The company is committed to sustainability and responsible mining practices, focusing on the well-being of its employees and the local communities. Through innovation and efficiency, it aims to grow its operations while adhering to strong governance
